title: Billing
body: Invoices are due monthly. Customers can pay by ACH, credit card, or wire transfer. Refunds post within five business days.

title: Authentication
body: Single sign-on authentication uses SAML metadata and rotates session tokens every hour.

title: Webhooks
body: Webhook deliveries include an HMAC signature header. Retry with exponential backoff when endpoints return 5xx.

title: Pagination
body: List endpoints return a cursor token. Pass the cursor on the next page request to continue through large result sets.

title: Encryption
body: Data at rest uses AES-256. API keys are encrypted with envelope encryption and rotated quarterly.

title: Shipping
body: International shipping requires customs forms and carrier tracking numbers for each parcel.

title: Enterprise
body: Enterprise plans include dedicated support, audit exports, and SAML SSO with custom attribute mapping.

title: Retention
body: Event logs are retained for ninety days by default. Enterprise tenants can configure longer retention windows.

title: Rate limits
body: API rate limits apply per workspace. Exceeding limits returns HTTP 429 with a Retry-After header.

title: NDJSON export
body: Bulk exports stream NDJSON records for invoices, payments, and delivery confirmations.
